message:
refactor(hash_tiers): derive Copy for ContentHash and AuthenticityHash, remove redundant .clone() calls across engine modules

hash_tiers.rs:
- Added Copy to the derive list for ContentHash and AuthenticityHash.
  Both types are fixed-size [u8; 32] newtypes that were previously
  Clone-only, forcing every pass-by-value to spell out .clone()
  explicitly. With Copy, the compiler handles bitwise copies
  implicitly, which is both more idiomatic and eliminates a class of
  "unnecessary clone" clippy warnings across the codebase.

Cascading changes across ~37 source files:
- Replaced .clone() with direct value copies on ContentHash and
  AuthenticityHash fields in artifact_compression_pipeline,
  benchmark_coverage_saturation, calibration_sentinel,
  capability_witness, cold_start_aot_governance,
  counterexample_synthesizer, esm_loader,
  frontier_complex_cartography, frontier_hole_governance,
  hardware_code_layout_governance, hole_witness_generator,
  hostcall_batch_transport, incident_replay_bundle,
  metadata_substrate_governance, minimized_repro_extraction,
  module_cache, module_index_parity_gate, module_live_binding,
  native_addon_membrane, novelty_synthesis_engine,
  obstruction_witness_emitter, offline_synthesis_pipeline,
  optimized_metadata_substrate, proof_backed_compression,
  react_compile_run_parity, regexp_string_governance,
  render_lane_specializer, replacement_lineage_log,
  s3_fifo_cache_gate, self_adjusting_resolution_graph,
  shipped_path_matrix, specialization_rollback_gate,
  tail_latency_feedback_control, tier_eligibility_substrate,
  translation_validation_receipt, and zero_placeholder_gate.

- metadata_substrate_governance.rs and minimized_repro_extraction.rs:
  removed unused BTreeMap import now that ContentHash copies don't
  require explicit map operations.

- hardware_code_layout_governance.rs: used evaluate() return value
  in tests to suppress unused-result warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -849,8 +849,8 @@ impl ModuleIndexParityGate {
             parity_verdict,
             cold_start_verdict,
             blocking_reasons,
-            parity_evidence_hash: parity_evidence.content_hash.clone(),
-            cold_start_evidence_hash: cold_start_evidence.content_hash.clone(),
+            parity_evidence_hash: parity_evidence.content_hash,
+            cold_start_evidence_hash: cold_start_evidence.content_hash,
             affected_packages,
             content_hash: ContentHash::compute(b""),
         };

@@ -462,7 +462,7 @@ impl CompressionPipeline {
         let mut receipt = CompressionReceipt {
             receipt_id: format!("receipt-{}", descriptor.artifact_id),
             artifact_id: descriptor.artifact_id.clone(),
-            original_hash: descriptor.content_hash.clone(),
+            original_hash: descriptor.content_hash,
             compressed_hash,
             canonical_id: descriptor.canonical_id.clone(),
             strategy,

@@ -1843,7 +1843,7 @@ impl<A: StorageAdapter> ReplacementLineageEvidenceIndex<A> {
                     old_cell_digest: replacement.old_cell_digest.clone(),
                     new_cell_digest: replacement.new_cell_digest.clone(),
                     promotion_timestamp_ns: replacement.promotion_timestamp_ns,
-                    replacement_content_hash: replacement.receipt_content_hash.clone(),
+                    replacement_content_hash: replacement.receipt_content_hash,
                     demotion_receipt_id: demotion.as_ref().map(|record| record.receipt_id.clone()),
                     demotion_reason: demotion
                         .as_ref()
